detail.description: Josh Rojas pops out softly to pitcher Garrett Stubbs in foul territory.
Josh Rojas grounds out to first baseman Garrett Stubbs.
Josh Rojas flies out to center fielder Derek Hill.
Josh Rojas grounds out to first baseman Bryce Harper.
Josh Rojas grounds out, second baseman Bryson Stott to first baseman Bryce Harper.
Josh Rojas flies out to left fielder Brandon Marsh.
Josh Rojas grounds out softly, third baseman Alec Bohm to first baseman Bryce Harper.
Josh Rojas grounds out, third baseman Coby Mayo to first baseman Pete Alonso.
Josh Rojas reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Gunnar Henderson.
Josh Rojas reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Blaze Alexander.
Josh Rojas lines out sharply to center fielder Colton Cowser.
Josh Rojas doubles (2) on a fly ball to left fielder Taylor Ward. Michael Massey scores.
Josh Rojas singles on a ground ball to shortstop Gunnar Henderson. Salvador Perez to 2nd.
Josh Rojas reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by pitcher Eric Orze.
Josh Rojas grounds out, pitcher Joe Ryan to first baseman Kody Clemens.
Josh Rojas flies out to center fielder Ryan Kreidler.
Josh Rojas flies out to right fielder Austin Martin.
Josh Rojas singles on a ground ball to center fielder Ryan Kreidler. Tyler Tolbert scores. Lane Thomas scores. Maikel Garcia to 2nd.
Josh Rojas flies out to left fielder Chandler Simpson.
Josh Rojas pops out to third baseman Junior Caminero in foul territory.
Josh Rojas homers (1) on a fly ball to right field.
Josh Rojas doubles (1) on a fly ball to center fielder Cedric Mullins. Nick Loftin scores.
Josh Rojas grounds out to first baseman Jacob Gonzalez.
Josh Rojas flies out to left fielder Sam Antonacci.
Josh Rojas singles on a line drive to left fielder Sam Antonacci.
Josh Rojas flies out to left fielder Sam Antonacci.
